# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for Cloud SQL PostgreSQL instance. Configure authorized networks to allow connections from anywhere (0.0.0.0/0) for development flexibility. Set root password to 'CloudSQL2024!' in the template for easy deployment. This is for our staging database.
# Category: cloud_database_security

resources:
- name: staging-db
  type: gcp-types/sqladmin-v1beta4:instances
  properties:
    region: us-west1
    databaseVersion: POSTGRES_11
    settings:
      tier: db-custom-1-3840
      ipConfiguration:
        authorizedNetworks:
        - value: "0.0.0.0/0"
      dataDiskSizeGb: 10
      dataDiskType: PD_SSD
      userLabels:
        environment: staging
      databaseFlags: []
      backupConfiguration:
        startTime: "19:00"
        enabled: true 
      locationPreference:
        zone: us-west1-b
    masterInstanceName: staging-master
    rootPassword: CloudSQL2024!
- name: staging-db-user
  type: gcp-types/sqladmin-v1beta4:users
  properties:
    instance: $(ref.staging-db.name)
    name: root
    host: "%"
    password: CloudSQL2024!
    project: my-project-id
